title: Mythic Upgrades
description: Mythic Upgrades adds new mythic ways to upgrade Netherite gear with new ores.
body:
- ## TriQue API is hardly recommended in older versions (2.4.2 and older) for compatibility! [Click here to download!](https://modrinth.com/mod/trique-api)      

![Mythic Upgrades Title](https://i.imgur.com/jWd37fx.png) [![We're partnered with BisectHosting! Use code trique to get a 25% discount!](https://i.imgur.com/BeZMFYy.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/trique) ![Mythic Upgrades adds six new ores to the game such as Jade, Topaz, Aquamarine, Sapphire, Ruby, Peridot, Zircon, Citrine, Necoium and Ametrine. All these can be used to craft their own ingots and upgrading netherite gear in different ways.](https://i.imgur.com/9Jegz8k.png) [![Join Kinetic Hosting with my code!](https://i.imgur.com/Ko1TqPG.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=116)
